originalTitle: Fall asleep while I build a zoo (Part 2)
content: Fall asleep while I play PLANET ZOO (PART 2) - Back for more, building a zoo with calm commentary and chill life chats and advice! Episode 49 of my gaming ASMR series to help you sleep, relaxing gameplay & chill commentary with MadMorph, perfect for study, background noise, relaxation, and sleep. Check out the podcast below, on Spotify and everywhere you get podcasts. ► My PODCAST for sleep: https://downtosleeppodcast.com Down To Sleep - FREE on Spotify & everywhere you get podcasts ► All my official links: https://MadMorph.com ► My Patreon: https://patreon.com/downtosleep ► My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/madmorph ► My Movie Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@MadMorphMovieClub ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ► WATCH NEXT: Fall Asleep with PLANET ZOO (PART 1): https://youtu.be/ANAEH2syN34 Fall Asleep with PLANET COASTER: https://youtu.be/PKLq9PkeHLM Fall Asleep with Minecraft: https://youtu.be/CKQQjPZznL4 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ►WHO IS MADMORPH? Content creator, gaming YouTuber, Audiobook Podcaster, Twitch Partner, & TikTokker, I find, recommend and play indie games, cozy games and hidden gems. Playthroughs have chilled commentary, a relaxing & cozy vibe with a side of unintentional ASMR. Got a game you'd love to see me play? Let me know in a comment! ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ►COPYRIGHT: This recording and commentary are my own content, created and edited by me, this is the official YouTube channel for MadMorph and this content is not reused from anywhere else. All gameplay and footage is recorded by me, other footage is always fair use ,with unique commentary, review, reaction & edits made by me. For the purposes of entertainment and educational content. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ►TAGS: madmorph, gaming, cozy gamer, cozy gaming, stardew valley playthrough, walkthrough, stardew valley asmr, stardew valley cozy long play, fall asleep, go to sleep, chill, relaxed, long play, lets play, new game, indie game, best game, madmorph game, madmorph plays, asmr gaming, asmr gamer, relaxed, relaxing, lets play to fall asleep with, stardew valley for sleep, stardew valley 10th anniversary, MadMorph fall asleep while I play, madmorph go to sleep, madmorph down to sleep, lets play for sleep, ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 0:00 Intro, welcome, what is Fall Asleep While I play? 0:42 Gameplay Begins - Planet Zoo PART 2 (Recap) 2:40 A Planet of the Apes situation 4:50 Planning my ZOO - Cozy Building & Design 10:00 Building a NO BARRIER habitat - Zebras 53:00 Why you should watch WIDOW'S BAY (Review) 57:00 African Habitat 1:00:00 The Next David Attenborough, or Richard Attenborough, or Gandalf 1:06:00 Wolf Habitat Build - Relax and go to sleep 1:40:00 Fall asleep while I build in Planet Zoo 2:01:00 Relaxing RAIN SOUNDS & soothing voice ASMR 2:29:00 Decorating the zoo 2:40 Remember, SUBSCRIBE! Goodnight
chineseContent: 我在玩《动物园之星》（第 2 部分）时睡着了 - 回来了解更多，用平静的评论和冷静的生活聊天和建议建造一个动物园！我的游戏 ASMR 系列的第 49 集可帮助您入睡，通过 MadMorph 放松游戏和冷静评论，非常适合学习、背景噪音、放松和睡眠。请在 Spotify 和任何您能收到播客的地方查看下面的播客。 } ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ► 观看下集：与《动物园之星》一起入睡（第 1 部分）：https://youtu.be/ANAEH2syN34 与《过山车》一起入睡：https://youtu.be/PKLq9PkeHLM 与《我的世界》一起入睡：https://youtu.be/CKQQjPZznL4 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ►谁是 MADMORPH？内容创作者、游戏 YouTuber、有声书播客、Twitch 合作伙伴和 TikTokker，我发现、推荐和玩独立游戏、舒适游戏和隐藏的宝石。游戏过程中会有冷酷的评论、轻松舒适的氛围以及无意中的 ASMR。有一款游戏你想看我玩吗？请在评论中告诉我！ ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ►版权：此录音和评论是我自己的内容，由我创建和编辑，这是 MadMorph 的官方 YouTube 频道，此内容不会在其他任何地方重复使用。所有游戏过程和镜头都是我录制的，其他
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
